title: Town Traits
description: Towns have baseline endowments and governance traits that set their character. These traits determine what goods they produce, their order/corruption levels, and their response to player actions. Traits create variety and strategic considerations.
definition-of-done: Town trait system with multiple trait types. Traits affect production, governance, and behavior. Traits visible to player. Traits can change over time based on events.
testing-plan: Verify trait system applies to all towns. Test traits affect gameplay correctly. Verify trait visibility. Test trait changes over time.
